DIVERGED: is_running method on TimerCentral takes TimerId instead of being method on timer object
DIVERGED: cancel_timer on TimerCentral replaces Stop on timer object
DIVERGED: C++ template class replaced by WatchedVar<T> with different API (get/set/signal_id vs Acquire/Lookup/Set/Remove)
DIVERGED: current_visit() returns VisitState struct instead of separate out-params
DIVERGED: view passed as parameter to animate() instead of stored reference
